title: Students need more than AI access–they need AI rights
summary_en: Higher education is moving at breakneck speed to embed AI into admissions, advising, instruction, grading, and student support, yet student protections have not kept pace with institutional enthusiasm.
title_cn: 学生不仅需要具备人工智能使用权限，更需要享有人工智能相关权利
summary_cn: 请您补充提供待翻译的摘要原文内容，以便为您完成规范翻译工作。

title: Dissecting higher ed’s complex–yet promising–relationship with AI
summary_en: ​T​he California State University (CSU) has released findings from its first-ever systemwide survey on artificial intelligence (AI), marking the largest and most comprehensive survey to date on generative artificial intelligence (AI) in higher education.
title_cn: 剖析高等教育与人工智能复杂且前景广阔的关系
